query:
-- Verificar companyId da empresa Baggio
SELECT id, name FROM companies WHERE name LIKE '%BAGGIO%' OR name LIKE '%B I IMOVEIS%';

-- Verificar companyId das vendas
SELECT companyId, COUNT(*) as total, MIN(saleDate) as primeira_venda, MAX(saleDate) as ultima_venda
FROM sales 
GROUP BY companyId;

-- Verificar vendas de Janeiro/2025
SELECT id, buyerName, saleValue, saleDate, companyId 
FROM sales 
WHERE YEAR(saleDate) = 2025 AND MONTH(saleDate) = 1
LIMIT 5;
